CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '102'), 'acknowledged', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '103'), 'planned', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '105'), 'client_planned', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '2'), 'start', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '51'), 'start', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '115'), 'start', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '116'), 'start', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '110'), 'occupant_absent', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '111'), 'occupant_absent', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '114'), 'occupant_denial', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '108'), 'canceled', IF(ISPICKVAL(Status, '101'), 'canceled', ''))))))))))))
CustomField.label: EventWO_Intent
